description_long: This is a vintage-style metal alarm clock with a round, blackened steel body and two angled, screw-like legs for support. The clock face is cream-colored with bold black Arabic numerals and a smaller inset dial at the top center, likely for setting the alarm. A pair of black hands indicate the time, while a brass winding key and a looped handle adorn the top, giving it a classic, mechanical appearance. The back of the clock features several adjustment knobs and a colorful sticker, adding a touch of character and suggesting manual operation. The surface is slightly worn, with a matte metallic sheen and visible seams along the body. This clock exudes an old-fashioned charm, suitable for display in a home, office, or retro-themed urban setting.
description: A vintage metal alarm clock with a round black body, bold numerals, and brass accents, supported by two angled legs. It features a classic cream face, adjustment knobs on the back, and a looped handle on top.
description_view_0: Front view showing the cream clock face with black Arabic numerals, two black hands, a small inset dial, and the brass handle and winding key on top.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the clock's rounded metallic body, the protruding brass handle, and one of the angled screw-like legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the adjustment knobs, winding mechanisms, and a colorful sticker, with the brass handle and top details visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved metal body, the angled leg, and partial visibility of the sticker on the back.
attribute_face_design: Round cream face with bold black Arabic numerals, a small inset dial at the top, and black hands; minimal decoration with a classic, utilitarian look.
